creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I have no problems with using the 121st century internet, but I'm afraid Frontier is and will until the end of their days as Verizon is buying them. I do hope for native IPv6 once that happens, but not holding m breath on it.

I do have a problem that http://pkg-status.freebsd.org still does not list information on beefy22. Not sure if beefy21 is in production, yet, though it has a few builds of packages for hardware from at least 2 decades ago. Is there any hope of getting pkg-status to list the awesome beefy22 builds and to get some time stamp on the builds and not just a randomly ordered list? I manually keep a chronological list of build hash order, but that really should not be required.

And, yes, this is nit-picking as I love the new builder for 140amd64. A full build in just 34 hours is GREAT (as Tony said. Is Tony the Tiger still saying that?)
